title: Masamune-Kun's Revenge Custom GUI Pack
body:
**![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/Mg8U8XI.png)**

**Introduction:**
This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Masamune-Kun's Revenge". I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy. The chosen color palette combines shades of Purple and Blue. However, I'm open to suggestions for alternative color schemes such as Yellow and White or any other preferences you may have. Your input matters, and I'll consider incorporating new color options based on community feedback. If you encounter any bugs, please report them, and I'll address them promptly.

**Feature Highlights:**
- **Hud:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/nr0Mb7B.png)
- **Settings:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/NsJbokV.png)
- **Inventory:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/4djjFgz.png)
- **Creative Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/od0bdUs.png)
- **Crafting Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/ozwbBA5.png)
- **Furnace:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/Qayo45u.png)
- **Stonecutter:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/ts0PwRR.png)
- **Loom:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/cpViOwJ.png)
- **Shulkerbox:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/wyPP03z.png)
- **Chest:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/8QZQFQw.png)
- **Horse Inventory:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/nycxWZe.png)
- **Brewing Stand:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/Y8yDwqT.png)
- **Beacon Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/VTDtYMS.png)
- **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/mfn5jj1.png)

**Community Engagement:**
Join our Discord server to suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in discussions, and stand a chance to win Discord Nitro giveaways every month. [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph)

**Additional Resources:**
- [ListarMC Website](https://listarmc.com/)

**Thank you for your support! ❤️**
